action.reasoning: Observation: Previous training achieved dev EER 0.0000 with unfrozen XLS-R-300M (10 epochs), implying perfect separation on clean dev set but likely massive overfitting to known attacks. Test EER unknown because eval harness fails with missing labels. Analysis: Need to reduce overfitting and improve robustness to unseen codecs/attacks with stronger augmentations: random resampling (codec simulation), aggressive noise/gain/time masking, low-pass filtering. Validate on augmented dev set to get realistic EER for model selection and learning rate scheduling. Use weight decay and label smoothing for regularization. Train 15 epochs (about 2.5h) to improve generalization. Decision: Update train.py with enhanced augmentations, dual-validation (clean + augmented), scheduler based on augmented EER. Run training, then next iteration submit eval to test if harness works.
